title: Property Consultant - Jayabheri Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Jayabheri Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!
